Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2AB0 "STARFORCE-2AB0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Starforce.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed disk highscore loading and saving by removing the calls to $FFD5 (load) at $3A1C and $FFD8 (save) at $3A5A.
